form.label: Get Well Plan 4
form.description: Version 1.1: Note: you cannot switch customers. Instead, relaunch dashboard from menu and choose customer again.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupNameSelected$")]

preview.set: Inventory Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" physicalAssetType="Chassis" ) OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") | fields sourcetype deviceId deviceName productFamily productId productType physicalAssetId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | fields deviceId deviceName productFamily productType productId physicalAssetId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId physicalAssetId | table deviceId physicalAssetId deviceName physicalAssetType serialNumber productId productFamily productType groupName

preview.set: Hardware Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query:
`cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" physicalAssetType="Chassis" ) OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:softwareendoflifebulletin")
| fields sourcetype deviceId deviceName productFamily productId physicalAssetId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName softwareVersion lastDayOfSupportDate | eval LDoS = if(sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin",lastDayOfSupportDate,null()) | eventstats first(LDoS) as LDoS by productId | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | fields _time deviceId deviceName productFamily productId physicalAssetId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName softwareVersion LDoS | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId physicalAssetId | search serialNumber!="" | rex field=LDoS mode=sed "s/T.*$//g" | fillnull value="null" LDoS | eval yrs2hw_ldos = round(((strptime(LDoS,"%Y-%m-%d"))-now())/(86400*365),2) | eval REFRESH = if(yrs2hw_ldos<1,"Yes","No") | table _time deviceId deviceName productFamily productId physicalAssetId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName softwareVersion LDoS yrs2hw_ldos REFRESH

preview.set: Software Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflife" physicalAssetType="Chassis") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:softwareendoflife") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:softwareendoflifebulletin") | fields sourcetype deviceId physicalAssetId productId hardwareEndOfLifeId deviceName softwareEndOfLifeId softwareVersion softwareType groupName lastDayOfSupportDate | eval swLdosDate = if(sourcetype="cisco:bcs:softwareendoflifebulletin",lastDayOfSupportDate,null()) | eval hwLdosDate = if(sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin",lastDayOfSupportDate,null()) | eventstats max(hwLdosDate) as hwLdosDate by hardwareEndOfLifeId | eventstats max(swLdosDate) as swLdosDate by softwareEndOfLifeId | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | where isnotnull(deviceId) | fillnull value="NA" hwLdosDate, swLdosDate | eval yrs2hw_ldos = if(hwLdosDate!="NA", round((strptime(hwLdosDate,"%Y-%m-%d") - now()) / (86400*365), 2), null()) | eval yrs2sw_ldos = if(swLdosDate!="NA", round((strptime(swLdosDate,"%Y-%m-%d") - now()) / (86400*365), 2), null()) | eval UPGRADE = if(yrs2sw_ldos < 1 AND (yrs2hw_ldos > 1 OR hwLdosDate="NA"),"Yes", "No") | fields deviceId physicalAssetId productId hardwareEndOfLifeId deviceName softwareEndOfLifeId softwareVersion softwareType groupName hwLdosDate swLdosDate UPGRADE yrs2sw_ldos yrs2hw_ldos

preview.set: Support Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" physicalAssetType="Chassis") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:contractserial") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflifebulletin" ) OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") | fields sourcetype deviceId deviceName productFamily physicalAssetId productId physicalAssetType serialNumber groupName softwareVersion coveredProductLineEndDate isCovered endOfServiceContractRenewalDate | eventstats max(coveredProductLineEndDate) as coveredProductLineEndDate, max(isCovered) as ContractStatus by serialNumber | eventstats max(endOfServiceContractRenewalDate) as eoSCR by productId | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | search sourcetype="cisco:bcs:asset" | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId physicalAssetId | rename physicalAssetType as EquipmentType, productFamily as ProductFamily | where EquipmentType="Chassis" | fillnull value="Not Active" ContractStatus | eval chassisNoContract = if(ContractStatus!="true" AND EquipmentType="Chassis", 1, 0) | eval isSpare = case(like(ProductFamily, "%*IP Phone%"),1, like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco Aironet%"),1, like(ProductFamily, "%Access Points%"),1, like(ProductFamily, "%Cisco VG% Series Gateways%"), 1, 1=1,0) | rex field=eoSCR mode=sed "s/T.*$//g" | fillnull value="null" eoSCR | eval timeEoSCR = strptime(eoSCR, "%Y-%m-%d") | eval serviceQuotable = if(eoSCR="null" OR now()<timeEoSCR, 1, 0) | eval AddNca = if(serviceQuotable=1 AND chassisNoContract=1 AND isSpare=0, 1, 0) | eval COVER = if(ProductFamily!="Missing" AND ProductFamily!="null" AND AddNca=1,"Yes","No")

preview.set: Security Advisories Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:securityadvisory" matchConfidence="Vulnerable") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:securityadvisorybulletin") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:device") | fields deviceId deviceName groupName matchConfidence securityAdvisoryColdId securityImpactRating matchConfidenceReason bulletinTitle softwareVersion productId productFamily | eventstats max(securityImpactRating) as sir max(bulletinTitle) as bulletinTitle by securityAdvisoryColdId | eval SECURITY = if(sir="Critical","Yes", "No") | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | fields deviceId matchConfidence matchConfidenceReason securityAdvisoryColdId sir groupName bulletinTitle deviceName, softwareVersion, productId, productFamily SECURITY

preview.set: Configuration Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:configbestpracticedetail") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:configbestpracticesummary") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:device") | fields sourcetype deviceId bestPracticeRuleId bestPracticeRisk groupName deviceName bestPracticeNuggetId productId productFamily softwareVersion HighBpDevices | eventstats first(bestPracticeRisk) as bestPracticeRisk by bestPracticeRuleId | eval CORRECT = if(bestPracticeRisk="High", "Yes", "No") | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId

preview.set: Data Collection Search is running, please wait a few seconds.

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:uirdetails") OR ( sourcetype="cisco:bcs:device") OR (sourcetype="cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember") | eventstats values(deviceName) as deviceName by deviceId | rename seenByManagedDeviceName as DeviceName | rex field=DeviceName mode=sed "s/ \(.*//g" | eval deviceName= coalesce(DeviceName, deviceName) | eventstats values(deviceId) as deviceId by deviceName | eventstats values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | table unidentifiedDeviceName unidentifiedDeviceIpAddress unidentifiedDeviceSource collectorName unidentifiedDeviceStatus unidentifiedDevicePlatform unidentifiedDeviceScore uirNceComments uirFilter groupName, timestamp deviceName deviceId | stats max(*) as * values(groupName) as groupName by deviceId | search unidentifiedDeviceScore>=1| sort -unidentifiedDeviceScore | where LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%Cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%sns%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%SNS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ucs%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%UCS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ise%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ISE%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%WS-C%-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%N%-C%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%AIR-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C9%00%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C68%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%DS-C%") | fields - uirNceComments uirFilter | search unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*AIR* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*9130* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*9117* | eval DISCOVER="Yes"

| loadjob $INVENTORY$ | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as Chassis_unformatted | eval Chassis_formatted = tostring(Chassis_unformatted, "commas") | table Chassis_unformatted, Chassis_formatted

| loadjob $INVENTORY$ | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Elements_unformatted | eval Elements_formatted = tostring(Elements_unformatted, "commas") | table Elements_unformatted, Elements_formatted

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Chassis Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $INVENTORY$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showInventoryData$ | $groupSelector$ | fields - groupName

div.style: width: 100%; height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #27ae60; color: #fff;
font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; transform: translateY(1px);
width: 100%; height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #27ae60; color: #fff;
font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; transform: translateY(1px);
width: 100%; height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #27ae60; color: #fff;
font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; transform: translateY(1px);
width: 100%; height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #27ae60; color: #fff;
font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; transform: translateY(1px);
width: 100%; height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #27ae60; color: #fff;
font-size: 30px; font-weight: bold; margin: 0; transform: translateY(1px);
width: 100%; height: 60px; color: #000; line-height: 40px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

div.p:
Hardware LDoS Already
or within 1 year

search.query: | loadjob $REFRESH$ | where REFRESH="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(serialNumber) as Chassis2Refresh

| loadjob $REFRESH$ | where REFRESH="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(serialNumber) as Chassis2Refresh | eval countRefresh = Chassis2Refresh | eval percentRefresh = round(100 * countRefresh/ $kvChassis$ ) | table percentRefresh

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Hardware End of Life Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $REFRESH$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showRefreshDetails$ | where REFRESH="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | rename physicalAssetType as EquipmentType, productFamily as ProductFamily | table deviceName ProductFamily productId EquipmentType LDoS serialNumber softwareVersion yrs2hw_ldos physicalAssetId

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;
font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

search.query: | loadjob $UPGRADE$ | where UPGRADE="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Chassis2Upgrade

| loadjob $UPGRADE$ | where UPGRADE="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Chassis2Upgrade | eval percentUpgrade = (100 * Chassis2Upgrade/$kvManagedElements$) | table percentUpgrade

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Software End of Life Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $UPGRADE$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showUpgradeDrilldown$ | where UPGRADE="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | table deviceId physicalAssetId productId hardwareEndOfLifeId deviceName softwareEndOfLifeId softwareVersion softwareType hwLdosDate swLdosDate yrs2sw_ldos yrs2hw_ldos

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%; line-height: 75%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;
font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;
font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

search.query: | loadjob $COVER$ | where COVER="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as countCover | table countCover

| loadjob $COVER$ | where COVER="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as countCover | eval percentCover = round(100 * countCover/$kvManagedElements$) | table percentCover

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Add Coverage Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $COVER$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showCoverDetails$ | where COVER="Yes" | where isnotnull(deviceId) | $groupSelector$ | table deviceName ProductFamily productId EquipmentType ContractStatus eoSCR chassisNoContract isSpare serialNumber softwareVersion physicalAssetId deviceId timeEoSCR serviceQuotable AddNca

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

search.query: | loadjob $SECURITY$ | where SECURITY="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Secure | table Secure
| loadjob $SECURITY$ | where SECURITY="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Secure | eval percentSecure = round(100 * (Secure)/$kvManagedElements$) | table percentSecure

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Critical PSIRT Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $SECURITY$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showSecureDetails$ | where SECURITY="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | table deviceId bulletinTitle matchConfidence matchConfidenceReason securityAdvisoryColdId sir deviceName softwareVersion productId productFamily

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

search.query: | loadjob $CORRECT$ | where CORRECT="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Correct | table Correct
| loadjob $CORRECT$ | where CORRECT="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Correct | eval percentCorrect = round(100 * (Correct)/$kvManagedElements$) | table percentCorrect

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Configuration Best Practices Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $CORRECT$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showCorrectDetails$ | where CORRECT="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | eventstats dc(deviceId) as HighBpDevices by bestPracticeNuggetId | table deviceName bestPracticeNuggetId productId productFamily softwareVersion HighBpDevices

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;
height: 100%; width: 100%;

p.style: font-size: 22px; font-family: 'Arial Regular', Arial, serif; color: black;

div.p:
Unidentified Inventory:
CDP & Syslog Inferred Devices

search.query: | loadjob $DISCOVER$ | where DISCOVER="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats count as Discover | table Discover
| loadjob $DISCOVER$ | where DISCOVER="Yes" | $groupSelector$ | stats count as Discover | eval percentDiscover = round(100 * (Discover)/$kvManagedElements$) | table percentDiscover

div.style: width: 100%; height: 40px; color: #000; line-height: 10px; text-align: center;

table.title: Unidentified Inventory Drilldown. To sort the table, click a header once or twice. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $DISCOVER$ | eval stoppanelfromloadingifnotclicked = $showAddDetails$ | where DISCOVER="Yes" | table unidentifiedDeviceName unidentifiedDeviceIpAddress unidentifiedDeviceSource collectorName unidentifiedDeviceStatus unidentifiedDevicePlatform unidentifiedDeviceScore uirNceComments uirFilter timestamp deviceName deviceId | $groupSelector$ | sort - unidentifiedDeviceScore | where LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%Cisco%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%sns%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%SNS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ucs%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%UCS%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ise%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%ISE%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%WS-C%-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%N%-C%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%AIR-%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C9%00%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%C68%") OR LIKE(unidentifiedDevicePlatform, "%DS-C%") | fields - groupName uirNceComments uirFilter timestamp | search unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*AIR* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*9130* AND unidentifiedDevicePlatform!=*9117*
